creator: ohauer@FreeBSD.org
text:
Rebuilding packages this morning many ports building with go failing with the following poudriere error message.


===========================================================================
=======================<phase: extract-depends>============================
===== env: USE_PACKAGE_DEPENDS_ONLY=1 USER=root UID=0 GID=0
===========================================================================
=======================<phase: extract        >============================
===== env: NO_DEPENDS=yes USER=nobody UID=65534 GID=65534
===> Fetching all distfiles required by <portname> for building
===> Fetching ... dependencies
===>  Extracting for <portname>
=> SHA256 Checksum OK for ...
=> SHA256 Checksum OK for ...
===> Tidying ... dependencies

=> failed to initialize build cache at /nonexistent/.cache/go-build: mkdir /nonexistent: permission denied
*** Error code 1

Stop.
make: stopped in /usr/ports/<cat>/<portname>


Not sure if this is related to https://cgit.freebsd.org/ports/commit/?id=b42522214dcc52b9a932af5661d38d426a5b8adb

Eventually doing a test with a rollback of this commit, but until now build is still in progress
